# Workspace Agent Policy configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/workspace-agent-policy.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: WorkspaceAgentPolicy
metadata:
  workspace: operations
  name: default
spec:
  enabled: true
  tools:
    allow:
      - search_workspace
      - list_assets
      - describe_asset
      - asset_lineage
      - list_workspace_asset_edges
      - list_dashboards
      - describe_dashboard
      - list_dashboard_components
      - list_dashboard_filter_options
      - query_dashboard_page
      - query_dashboard_visual_data
      - query_dashboard_table_data
      - query_table
      - list_semantic_models
      - describe_model
      - list_semantic_datasets
      - describe_semantic_dataset
      - list_semantic_fields
      - preview_semantic_dataset
      - query_semantic_dataset
      - explain_semantic_preview
      - explain_semantic_query
      - query_visual
    deny: []
  instructions: "Use operations workspace dashboards and semantic models for fulfillment, delivery, review, and geography questions."
```
